popularStory.description: Elizabeth of York (11 February 1466-11 February 1503) was the first queen consort of England of the Tudor dynasty from 18 January 1486 until her death, as the wife of Henry VII. She married Henry in 1 …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth of York Queen Consort of England於1466年2月1日出生在英國英格蘭米德萊可維斯特明斯特帕拉斯 本 維斯特明斯特時，她的父親Edward IV King of England23歲，母親Elizabeth Woodville Queen Consort of England28歲。她於1486年1月18日與Henry VII King of England在英國米德萊可維斯特明斯特維斯特明斯特 艾比結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1503年2月11日在英國素瑞里士滿享年37歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭米德萊可維斯特明斯特維斯特明斯特 艾比。

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese: Cheng, Jing, Kam Fung, Wai Shing, Wing, Yali, Yuk.
variant Romanization of the surnames 歐 and 區, see   Ou   1 and 2.

variants.name: Ou
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Ying, Ching, Heng, Hong, Jia, Kuang Yu, Li-Ching, Cho, Chong, Chung, Sa.  Southeast Asian Lichun, Ming, Quan, Roeun, Sokhom, Chau, Hai, Leang, Ly, Nhanh, Phan, Pho, Tha.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 歐, meaning ‘to sing someone's praise’ in ancient Chinese: (i) from the placename Dong Ou (東甌), a fief (in present-day Wenzhou in Zhejiang province) which was granted to Yao in 192  BC . It is said that Yao was a descendant of Wujiang (reigned 355–333  BC ), king of the state of Yue (located mainly in present-day Zhejiang and Jiangxi provinces) during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ). (ii) from the placename Ou Yu (歐餘), the name of a fief (located in present-day Zhejiang province) that was granted to Ti, the second son of Wujiang (reigned 355–333  BC ), king of the state of Yue (located mainly in present-day Zhejiang and Jiangxi provinces) during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ).

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 區, originally denoting an ancient vessel for measurement in ancient Chinese: from the personal name of Ou Zhizi (歐治子), an expert sword-maker who lived during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476 BC ). Some of his descendants inherited Ou (歐) as their surname, simplifying the Chinese character 歐 to 區.

nameMeanings.name: York
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from the city of York in northern England. The surname is now widespread throughout England. Originally, the city bore the Latin name Eburacum, which is probably from a Brittonic name meaning ‘yew-tree place’. This was altered by folk etymology to Old English Eoforwīc (from the elements eofor ‘wild boar’ + wīc ‘specialized farmstead’). This name was taken over by Scandinavian settlers, who altered it back to opacity in the form Jórvík or Jórk (English York, which became finally settled as the placename in the 13th century). The surname has also been adopted by Jews as an Americanized form of various like-sounding Jewish surnames.
In some cases also an American shortened and altered form of the East Slavic patronymic   Yurkovich   or its Croatian, Slovak, or Slovenian variants. Compare   Yurk  .

variants.name: Yurkovich
meanings: Ukrainian (standard transliteration Yurkovych) and Belorussian: patronymic from the personal name Yurko and its Belorussian equivalent Yurka, pet forms of Ukrainian Yuriy and Belorussian Yuray, equivalents of Greek Geōrgios (see George ).
Americanized form of Croatian Jurković, Slovak and Slovenian Jurkovič (see Jurkovic , compare Jurkovich and Yurkovic ).
Jewish (from Bessarabia): habitational name for someone from Yurkovtsy in Ukraine.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth of York Queen Consort of England was born on 1 February 1466, in Palace of Westminster, Westminster, Middlesex, England, United Kingdom, her father, Edward IV King of England, was 23 and her mother, Elizabeth Woodville Queen Consort of England, was 28. She married Henry VII King of England on 18 January 1486, in Westminster Abbey, Westminster, Middlesex, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 11 February 1503, in Richmond, Surrey, England, at the age of 37, and was buried in Westminster Abbey, Westminster, Middlesex, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth of York Queen Consort of England est née le 1 février 1466, à Palace of Westminster, Westminster, Middlesex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Edward IV King of England, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Woodville Queen Consort of England, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé Henry VII King of England le 18 janvier 1486, à Westminster Abbey, Westminster, Middlesex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 11 février 1503, à Richmond, Surrey, Angleterre, à l’âge de 37 ans, et a été enterrée à Westminster Abbey, Westminster, Middlesex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth of York Queen Consort of England am 1. Februar 1466 in Palace of Westminster, Westminster, Middlesex, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Edward IV King of England 23 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Woodville Queen Consort of England 28. Sie hat am 18. Januar 1486 in Westminster Abbey, Westminster, Middlesex, England Henry VII King of England geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 11. Februar 1503 im Alter von 37 Jahren in Richmond, Surrey, England und wurde in Westminster Abbey, Westminster, Middlesex, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth of York Queen Consort of England è nata il il 1 febbraio 1466 nel Palace of Westminster, Westminster, Middlesex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Edward IV King of England, aveva 23 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Woodville Queen Consort of England, aveva 28 anni. Lei sposato Henry VII King of England il 18 gennaio 1486, nel Westminster Abbey, Westminster, Middlesex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 11 febbraio 1503, nel Richmond, Surrey, England, all'età di 37 anni, e fu sepolta a Westminster Abbey, Westminster, Middlesex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth of York Queen Consort of Englandが1466年2月1日にイギリスイギリスミッドレセックスウエストミンスタープアレイス オフ ウエストミンスターで生まれた時，父Edward IV King of Englandは23歳，母Elizabeth Woodville Queen Consort of Englandは28歳であった。1486年1月18日にイギリスミッドレセックスウエストミンスターウエストミンスター アビーでHenry VII King of Englandと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1503年2月11日にイギリススリーリチモンドで37歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスミッドレセックスウエストミンスターウエストミンスター アビーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth of York Queen Consort of England(이)가 1466년 2월 1일 영국 잉글랜드 미들레세스 웨스트민스터 팔레이스 프 웨스트민스터에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Edward IV King of England(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Woodville Queen Consort of England(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 1486년 1월 18일 영국 미들레세스 웨스트민스터 웨스트민스터 애브브이에서 Henry VII King of England(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1503년 2월 11일 영국 수리 리ch몽에서 37세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 미들레세스 웨스트민스터 웨스트민스터 애브브이에 묻혔다.

pt.1 February 1466–11 February 1503: 1 de fevereiro de 1466–11 de fevereiro de 1503
pt.Westminster Abbey, Westminster, Middlese: Westminster Abbey, Westminster, Middlesex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.Palace of Westminster, Westminster, Midd: Palace of Westminster, Westminster, Middlesex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth of York Queen Consort of England nasceu em 1 de fevereiro de 1466, em Palace of Westminster, Westminster, Middlesex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Edward IV King of England, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Woodville Queen Consort of England, tinha 28 anos. Ela casou-se com Henry VII King of England em 18 de janeiro de 1486, em Westminster Abbey, Westminster, Middlesex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 11 de fevereiro de 1503, em Richmond, Surrey, Inglaterra, com 37 anos, e foi sepultada em Westminster Abbey, Westminster, Middlesex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Westminster Abbey, Westminster, Middlese: вестминстир эбби, вестминстир, миддлесекс, Англия, Великобритания
ru.Palace of Westminster, Westminster, Midd: палеис оф вестминстир, вестминстир, миддлесекс, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth of York Queen Consort of England родилась 1 февраля 1466 г. в местности палеис оф вестминстир, вестминстир, миддлесекс, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Edward IV King of England было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Woodville Queen Consort of England, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Henry VII King of England 18 января 1486 г. в местности вестминстир эбби, вестминстир, миддлесекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла 11 февраля 1503 г. в местности ричмонд, сурри, Англия в возрасте 37 лет и была похоронена в местности вестминстир эбби, вестминстир, миддлесекс, Англия, Великобритания.

es.1 February 1466–11 February 1503: 1 de febrero de 1466–11 de febrero de 1503
es.Westminster Abbey, Westminster, Middlese: Westminster Abbey, Westminster, Middlesex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido
es.Palace of Westminster, Westminster, Midd: Palace of Westminster, Westminster, Middlesex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth of York Queen Consort of England nació el 1 de febrero de 1466, en Palace of Westminster, Westminster, Middlesex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Edward IV King of England, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Woodville Queen Consort of England, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Henry VII King of England el 18 de enero de 1486, en Westminster Abbey, Westminster, Middlesex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 11 de febrero de 1503, en Richmond, Surrey, Inglaterra, a la edad de 37 años, y fue sepultada en Westminster Abbey, Westminster, Middlesex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
